description_long: This shotgun features a robust, matte-finished metal barrel with multiple vent holes along the top, suggesting heat dissipation functionality. The fore-end is equipped with a prominent pump grip, ribbed for secure handling, and a visible row of shotgun shells is mounted on the side of the receiver for quick reloading. The stock is constructed from a dark brown material, likely wood or a synthetic composite, and is shaped in a traditional full stock style for shoulder support. The receiver and barrel are primarily gray, with the pump and shell holder adding visual contrast through their darker and red tones. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, providing protection for the trigger while allowing easy access. Overall, the design is utilitarian and practical, suitable for urban environments where reliability and ease of use are paramount.
description: A matte gray pump-action shotgun with a vented barrel, ribbed pump grip, side-mounted shell holder, and a traditional dark brown full stock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, vent holes along the barrel, and the pump grip beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the shotgun, the ribbed pump, side-mounted shell holder, and the full stock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pump, shell holder, and the full stock from the other side.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vent holes along the top and a medium-length barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
